zh: 想象的秩序（赫拉利三部曲）
def_zh: 《人类简史》（Sapiens）：智人胜出靠认知革命——用虚构故事（imagined orders 想象的秩序：神、国家、货币、公司、人权皆属“互为主体的现实”）实现大规模陌生人协作；农业革命是“史上最大骗局”。《未来简史》（Homo Deus）：人文主义之后的数据主义（dataism）。《智人之上》（Nexus）：信息网络史——信息的功能是连接而非求真，故需自我纠错机制。赫拉利体是当代英语大历史写作的通用语。
def_en: Sapiens' engine-idea: Homo sapiens won by the Cognitive Revolution — fiction. Gods, nations, money, corporations and human rights are 'imagined orders', intersubjective realities that let millions of strangers cooperate; the Agricultural Revolution gets billed as 'history's biggest fraud'. Homo Deus extends the arc to dataism after humanism; Nexus recasts it all as the history of information networks, whose job is connection, not truth — hence the need for self-correcting mechanisms. Love it or roll your eyes, Harari-speak is the lingua franca of airport big history, and the Economist reviews each volume like a policy event.
example: 'Money is the most successful story ever told' is the Harari line every fintech keynote borrows — and a two-sentence bridge from [[jiaozi]] to [[world-monetary-system]] for your own essays.
nuance: imagined orders 与安德森 imagined communities（想象的共同体——民族主义研究经典，链 [[westphalia]]）须区分而常混用。“互为主体”= intersubjective。赫拉利对 [[neolithic-farming]]、[[peking-man]] 的翻案叙事与教材叙事对读极有趣。
etymology: inter-（之间）+ subject（拉丁 subiectus 置于下者→主体）——“互为主体”的存在。

synonyms.sentence: Shared fictions scale cooperation beyond the campfire.
A grand narrative explains everything and forgives itself.

en: Guns, Germs, and Steel: the geography hypothesis
def_zh: 戴蒙德对“亚力的问题”（为何是欧洲人征服美洲而非相反）的回答：各大洲命运差异源于地理禀赋而非人种——欧亚大陆可驯化动植物多、东西轴线利于传播、人畜共处孕育病菌免疫（天花灭美洲——枪炮病菌钢铁三件套中病菌最致命）。反种族主义的环境决定论，亦因“决定论”倾向被批评（对比制度学派《国家为什么失败》）。
def_en: Diamond's answer to Yali's question — why did Europeans conquer the Americas and not the reverse? Geography, not genes: Eurasia drew the domesticable plants and animals, its east-west axis spread them, and millennia beside livestock brewed the germs (smallpox above all) that did most of the conquering. An anti-racist environmental determinism — and the standing target of the institutions school (Why Nations Fail), making Diamond v. Acemoglu the default 'why the West' seminar debate.
example: The 90-percent-died-of-disease statistic behind [[triangular-trade]]'s labour shortage is this book's centrepiece — germs as the unlisted conquistador.
nuance: 环境决定论 = environmental determinism（链 [[human-geography-basics]] 的学科对轴——教材的“因地制宜”是其温和版）。与 [[columbian-exchange]]、[[epidemics-medicine]] 三点连线即美洲征服的完整解释框架。
etymology: determinism 源自拉丁 determinare（划界）——决定论即“边界早已划定”。

synonyms.sentence: Geographic endowment loads the dice before history rolls them.
Biogeography asks what could be domesticated, and where.

def_zh: 全球最流行经济学入门教材的开篇框架：人们面临权衡取舍（trade-offs）；机会成本（某物的成本是为得到它所放弃的东西）；理性人考虑边际量（marginal thinking）；人们会对激励作出反应（incentives）；贸易能使每个人状况更好（比较优势）；市场通常是组织经济活动的好方法（看不见的手）；政府有时能改善市场结果（市场失灵：外部性/市场势力）；生产率决定生活水平；货币超发引起通胀；社会面临通胀与失业的短期权衡（菲利普斯曲线）。
def_en: The opening framework of the world's bestselling econ textbook — ten principles that double as the Economist's house grammar: trade-offs everywhere; opportunity cost ('what you give up to get it'); thinking at the margin; people respond to incentives; trade makes everyone better off (comparative advantage); markets usually organise activity well; governments can sometimes improve outcomes (market failure); productivity determines living standards; printing money causes inflation; and the short-run inflation-unemployment trade-off. Learn these ten and half of financial journalism parses itself.
collocations: there's no such thing as a free lunch
example: TANSTAAFL — 'there ain't no such thing as a free lunch' — is principle one in slang form; 天下没有免费的午餐 crossed into Chinese so completely that both languages now cite it at each other.
nuance: 机会成本 = opportunity cost；边际 = marginal（边际革命 the marginal revolution 为经济思想史节点）；比较优势 = comparative advantage（李嘉图——[[adam-smith]] 的续章）。本节点为 Economist 阅读的最小经济学装备。
etymology: opportunity 源自拉丁 ob portum（顺风向港）——机会本义“顺风”；cost 拉丁 constare（合计为）。

synonyms.sentence: Every policy is a trade-off wearing one side's clothes.
Change the incentive and the sermon becomes unnecessary.

def_zh: 克利尔的行为改变框架：微小改进的复利（每天好1%，一年37倍）；结果滞后于系统（“你不会升到目标的高度，只会落到系统的水平”）；身份认同驱动（不是“我要跑步”而是“我是跑步的人”）；习惯回路四法则——提示（显而易见）、渴求（有吸引力）、反应（简便易行：两分钟法则）、奖赏（令人满足）；环境设计胜过意志力。
def_en: Clear's behaviour-change canon: the compound interest of 1% daily gains; 'you do not rise to the level of your goals, you fall to the level of your systems'; identity-based habits ('I am a runner' beats 'I want to run'); the four laws on the cue-craving-response-reward loop — obvious, attractive, easy (the two-minute rule), satisfying; and environment design over willpower. Self-help's current lingua franca — its vocabulary now appears in teacher PD and product design alike.
example: 习惯的复利 and marginal gains ([[econ-principles]]) are the same maths wearing different jackets — Clear借自 British Cycling 的 1% 哲学如今是中英自我提升话语的共同货币。
nuance: “复利”跨域使用（金融→习惯）链 [[personal-finance-classics]]。cue/craving/response/reward 的中译（提示/渴求/反应/奖赏）已随中文版固定。与 [[xunzi-learning]] 积跬步传统的呼应是绝佳中西对照。
etymology: habit 源自拉丁 habere（持有）→ habitus（习性、衣袍）——习惯即“穿在身上的持有”。

synonyms.sentence: A routine is a decision made once and spent daily.
Compounding is patience expressed as arithmetic.

def_zh: 书库中的理财经典共享一套概念语汇：《富爸爸穷爸爸》——资产（把钱放进口袋）与负债（把钱掏出口袋）之辨、被动收入、“老鼠赛跑”；《邻家的百万富翁》——隐形富豪的节俭实证（收入≠财富）；《百万富翁快车道》——慢车道批判与规模化系统；《复利效应》——微小选择的指数积累；《思考致富》——目标与信念的先行。共同底层：复利、现金流、资产配置——与[[index-investing]]的被动投资哲学构成个人金融的两翼。
def_en: The shelf shares one working vocabulary: Rich Dad's asset/liability test (does it put money in your pocket or take it out?), passive income and the rat race; The Millionaire Next Door's data on invisible frugal wealth (income ≠ net worth); The Millionaire Fastlane's attack on the slow lane in favour of scalable systems; The Compound Effect's exponential small choices; Think and Grow Rich's goal-fixation ur-text. Underneath: compounding, cash flow, allocation — the folk curriculum whose sophisticated sibling is [[index-investing]].

sources.chapter: Rich Dad / Millionaire Next Door / Fastlane / Compound Effect

example: “睡后收入” — income while you sleep — is Chinese internet's translation of passive income, one of the rare finance memes that localised with a better pun.
nuance: 资产/负债的富爸爸定义与会计定义不同（修辞性再定义——阅读时须自觉）。“老鼠赛跑”= the rat race。此类书的美式布道文体（exhortative self-help register）本身是英语文体学样本。
etymology: asset 源自古法语 asez（足够）——资产本义“足以偿债之物”。

synonyms.sentence: Cash flow is the pulse; net worth is the physique.
Passive income is rent collected from your past decisions.

en: The Bitcoin Standard and sound money
def_zh: 阿莫斯从奥地利学派立场重述货币史：健全货币（sound money——难以增发：贵金属的存量/增量比 stock-to-flow）造就低时间偏好（time preference）与文明积累；金本位崩溃后的法币时代即“政府货币”通胀时代；比特币被论证为数字时代的健全货币（2100万枚硬上限）。作为立场鲜明的奥派宣言，与主流货币经济学（[[world-monetary-system]]）对读方见全景。
def_en: Ammous retells monetary history as an Austrian-school sermon: sound money (hard to inflate — high stock-to-flow, gold the historical champion) breeds low time preference and civilisation; the post-1971 fiat era is government money and chronic debasement; bitcoin, capped at 21 million, is nominated as the digital successor. Read as a manifesto against the mainstream account in [[world-monetary-system]] — the pairing is the whole crypto debate in two book spines.
example: 'Fiat' went from monetary-economics jargon to crypto-Twitter insult — reading this book explains both the argument and the attitude behind every 'have fun staying poor'.
nuance: 健全货币 = sound money（奥派术语）；时间偏好 = time preference。奥地利学派 the Austrian School（哈耶克米塞斯——链 [[serfdom]] 的《通往奴役之路》作者）。中国语境下比特币讨论的政策约束是另一层对照。
etymology: sound（健全）源自拉丁 sanus（健康）经古法语——sound money 即“健康的钱”。

synonyms.sentence: Hard money is hard to print, by design.
A store of value is trust with a ticker.

def_zh: 斯科特·扬（MIT四年课程一年自学完成者）的高强度自学框架九原则：元学习（先画学习地图）、专注、直接性（directness——在目标场景中学：学语言就去说）、反复操练弱点（drill）、提取练习（retrieval——测试即学习）、反馈、保持（间隔重复）、直觉（费曼技巧）、实验。对本项目的直接意义：用概念网络+双语对读学英语正是 directness 与 retrieval 的实践。
def_en: Scott Young's nine-principle framework for aggressive self-education (he speed-ran MIT's CS degree in a year): metalearning first (map the subject), focus, directness (learn in the context of use — speak the language, don't just study it), drill the weak sub-skills, retrieval over review, feedback, retention by spacing, intuition via the Feynman technique, experimentation. This knowledge base is itself an ultralearning artefact — directness and retrieval applied to Economist English.
example: 'Retrieval practice beats rereading' is the one cognitive-science finding every teacher-training course now drills — the same principle whether the learner is your Year 9s or yourself with the Economist.
nuance: 提取练习 = retrieval practice；间隔重复 = spaced repetition（Anki 文化的理论根据）；费曼技巧 = the Feynman technique（以教代学）。与 [[instructional-science]] 共享证据基础——学与教是一枚硬币。
etymology: meta- 希腊“在后、超越”+ learning——关于学习的学习。

synonyms.sentence: Self-directed learning replaces the syllabus with a map you draw.
Deliberate practice aims at the error, not the ease.

zh: 斯多亚主义（《沉思录》与爱比克泰德）
def_zh: 书库中《沉思录》（皇帝的私人札记）、爱比克泰德（奴隶出身的哲人）《论说集》及Stoic Six Pack：核心是控制二分法（dichotomy of control——有些事取决于我们，有些不；只为前者负责）、依自然而活、消极想象（premeditatio malorum 预想失去以珍惜当下）、把障碍变道路（“行动之障碍推进行动”）。当代复兴为硅谷与体育界的操作系统（Ryan Holiday）；与儒家修身、道家顺应的比较是中西心性论的常设议题。
def_en: The emperor's private notebook (Meditations) and the freed slave's lectures (Epictetus) teach one operating system: the dichotomy of control — some things are up to us, some are not, and serenity lives in the difference; live according to nature; rehearse loss to relish presence (premeditatio malorum); 'the impediment to action advances action'. Reborn as Silicon Valley's and locker-room philosophy, and the standing western partner in any comparison with Confucian self-cultivation ([[zeng-guofan]]) or Daoist acceptance ([[laozi]]).
example: Small-s 'stoic' in everyday English ('she was stoic at the funeral') is this school fossilised into an adjective — the same lexicalisation路径 as [[sparta]]'s spartan.
nuance: 控制二分法 = the dichotomy of control（爱比克泰德《手册》开篇）。amor fati（爱命运）、memento mori（勿忘死）以拉丁语直接流通。马可·奥勒留 = Marcus Aurelius（[[roman-empire]] 的哲学家皇帝——五贤帝之一，历史与哲学在此合流）。
etymology: equanimity 源自拉丁 aequus（平）+ animus（心）——“平心”即斯多亚之的。

synonyms.sentence: Fortitude is keeping your post when preference has fled.
Self-mastery begins at the border of what is yours to command.

zh: 《被讨厌的勇气》（阿德勒心理学）
en: The Courage to Be Disliked: Adlerian psychology
def_zh: 岸见一郎以哲人—青年对话体普及阿德勒：目的论反因果论（不是过去决定你，而是你为当下目的“选用”过去——与弗洛伊德创伤决定论相对）；一切烦恼皆源于人际关系；课题分离（separation of tasks——分清谁的课题，不干涉他人课题、不让他人干涉你的）；被讨厌的勇气即自由的代价；共同体感觉与横向关系（鼓励而非表扬）。东亚现象级畅销，其词汇已入中文日常。
def_en: Kishimi's philosopher-and-youth dialogues made Adler East Asia's therapist: teleology over trauma (you employ your past for present purposes — the anti-Freud); all problems are interpersonal problems; the separation of tasks (whose problem is it? intervene in no one's, surrender yours to no one); freedom is the willingness to be disliked; community feeling and horizontal relationships (encourage, don't praise). Its vocabulary — 课题分离 above all — is now everyday Chinese.

sources.chapter: The Courage to Be Disliked (Kishimi & Koga)

example: 课题分离 and 'boundaries' ([[jiceng-women]]) are the decade's twin imports doing the same emotional work in Chinese — Adler via Japan, therapy-speak via America, converging on one skill.
nuance: 课题分离 = the separation of tasks（阿德勒学派术语经日文转译定型）。目的论 = teleology（哲学词的心理学挪用）。对话体（Socratic dialogue——链 [[socrates]]）是其文体前辈。
etymology: teleology 源自希腊 telos（目的）+ logos——目的论：行为由所欲之未来牵引。

synonyms.sentence: Adler's individual psychology treats inferiority as fuel.
A boundary is a task returned to its owner.

def_zh: 人口学教科书（Lundquist等）的概念基座：人口转变理论（demographic transition——高出生高死亡→高出生低死亡（人口爆炸）→低低均衡；第二次人口转变：低于更替水平）；总和生育率（TFR，更替水平2.1）；人口金字塔与年龄结构（人口红利 demographic dividend、老龄化 population ageing、抚养比）；预期寿命；迁移（推拉理论）；队列与时期分析（cohort/period）。中国语境：从计划生育到三孩政策与“未富先老”——Economist 人口报道的全部词汇。
def_en: The textbook toolkit of your master's field: demographic transition theory (high-high → boom → low-low, with the second transition below replacement); total fertility rate against the 2.1 replacement benchmark; population pyramids, dependency ratios, the demographic dividend and its ageing aftermath; life expectancy; migration's push-pull; cohort v. period analysis. Applied to China — one-child to three-child, 'getting old before getting rich' — it is the vocabulary of every Economist demography chart, which is to say, several per issue.

sources.chapter: Demography: The Study of Human Population (Lundquist et al.)

example: 'Getting old before getting rich' (未富先老) is the China-demography headline formula — a Chinese coinage that entered English intact, your two professional languages meeting in one phrase.
nuance: 人口转变 = the demographic transition；总和生育率 = TFR；人口红利 = the demographic dividend；抚养比 = dependency ratio。用户的人口学硕士背景使本节点为“专业词汇双语化”的锚点——链 [[malthus]]、[[ecology-population]]、[[qing-prosperity]] 人口线全网贯通。
etymology: demography 源自希腊 dēmos（民众）+ graphia（书写）——“书写人口”，与 democracy 同根异枝。

synonyms.sentence: Population dynamics move slowly, then all at once.
Fertility below replacement rewrites every pension.

zh: GIS 与空间分析核心概念
def_zh: Chang《地理信息系统导论》的概念骨架：数据模型（矢量 vector——点线面要素；栅格 raster——像元）；坐标系与投影（datum、UTM）；空间关系（拓扑、缓冲区 buffer、叠加 overlay）；空间分析（插值、密度、网络分析）；遥感与GPS数据源；地图学输出（专题图、分级设色 choropleth）。“地理学第一定律”（Tobler：万物相关，近者尤甚）为空间统计之魂。用户的本科专业——本节点即其专业英语的登记处。
def_en: The conceptual skeleton of Chang's standard text — and of your undergraduate degree: data models (vector's points-lines-polygons v. raster's cells), coordinate systems and projections, topology, buffers and overlays, interpolation and network analysis, remote sensing and GPS inputs, cartographic output down to the choropleth map. Presiding over it, Tobler's First Law of Geography: everything is related to everything else, but near things are more related — the one-liner spatial statistics grew from.
example: Every election-night map argument — precincts v. hexbins v. cartograms — is a GIS design seminar in public; the vocabulary here lets you critique it in both languages.
nuance: 矢量/栅格 = vector/raster；缓冲区分析 = buffer analysis；叠加 = overlay；分级设色图 = choropleth。链 [[human-geography-basics]]（学科的技术臂）与 [[demography-core]]（空间人口学）。
etymology: geo-（大地）+ spatial（拉丁 spatium 空间）——地理空间的。

synonyms.sentence: Spatial analysis asks where before it asks why.
Cartography is rhetoric with coordinates.

zh: 教学科学核心概念（教师专业书）
def_zh: 书库教师专业书群的共同知识底座：认知负荷理论（工作记忆有限——Willingham《为什么学生不喜欢上学》：记忆是思考的残留物）；Rosenshine 教学原则（小步子、大量提问、示范、检查理解、独立练习高成功率）；显性教学（Explicit Instruction, Archer）；Lemov《教无不胜》63技（冷不丁点名 cold call、不容退出 no opt out）；课堂行为管理（Bennett《掌控教室》：常规先于关系）；文化响应教学（Hammond：高期待+脚手架）；伍尔福克《教育心理学》总纲。NSW 教师职业语汇的原文层。
def_en: The shared evidence base of your professional shelf: cognitive load theory and Willingham's 'memory is the residue of thought'; Rosenshine's principles (small steps, many checks, models, high-success practice); explicit instruction (Archer); Lemov's 63 techniques (cold call, no opt out); Bennett's behaviour-first classroom (routines before relationships); Hammond's culturally responsive teaching (high expectations plus scaffolds); Woolfolk's Ed Psych as the umbrella. This is the working English of NSW staffrooms and PD days — your trade's terminology at the source.

sources.chapter: Running the Room (Bennett) / Culturally Responsive Teaching (Hammond)

example: NESA's 'explicit teaching' push and every faculty meeting's 'CFU' and 'do now' come straight from these books — the node doubles as your induction-year glossary.
nuance: 认知负荷 = cognitive load（Sweller——澳洲学者！NSW 教育语境的本土权威）；提取练习链 [[ultralearning]]；脚手架 = scaffolding（布鲁纳/维果茨基 ZPD 最近发展区）。显性教学 vs 探究式（explicit vs inquiry）为当代教学论主战场——澳洲课程战争的核心词。
etymology: pedagogy 源自希腊 pais（儿童）+ agein（引领）——“领童之术”，原指领孩上学的奴仆。

synonyms.sentence: Explicit instruction shows, checks, then releases.
Respect cognitive load and the novices stop drowning.

zh: 创伤心理学（《身体从未忘记》等）
en: trauma psychology: the body keeps the score
def_zh: 范德考克《身体从未忘记》：创伤存储于身体与神经系统而非仅记忆——过度警觉、闪回、解离；治疗须经身体（EMDR、瑜伽、正念）而非仅谈话。佩里《登天之梯》：发展性创伤与神经序贯疗法——安抚先于说理（regulate-relate-reason）。沃克《不原谅也没关系》（CPTSD）：复杂性创伤后应激障碍、情绪闪回、内在批判者。ACEs（童年不良经历）研究为公共卫生框架。对教师的直接意义：创伤知情教学（trauma-informed practice）已入学校语汇。
def_en: Van der Kolk's thesis made the title a proverb: trauma lives in body and nervous system, not just narrative — hypervigilance, flashbacks, dissociation — so healing must pass through the body (EMDR, yoga, mindfulness), not talk alone. Perry's sequence (regulate, relate, reason — calm before you converse) and Walker's CPTSD map (emotional flashbacks, the inner critic) extend it; the ACEs studies give it public-health teeth. For a teacher the cash value is immediate: 'trauma-informed practice' is now staffroom English, and this shelf is its source code.

sources.chapter: The Body Keeps the Score / The Boy Who Was Raised as a Dog / CPTSD

example: 'The body keeps the score' has become English's default metaphor for somatised stress — quoted far beyond psychology, exactly as 身体是诚实的 works in Chinese internet speech.
nuance: 创伤知情 = trauma-informed（教育与社工政策词）；复杂性创伤 = complex PTSD/CPTSD；解离 = dissociation。与 [[courage-disliked]] 的目的论构成当代心理话语的对轴（创伤决定 vs 目的选择）——两书并读即一场论战。
etymology: trauma 希腊语“伤口”直借——心理创伤即灵魂的伤口。

synonyms.sentence: Hypervigilance is an alarm that forgot the war ended.
Resilience grows in relationship, not in lectures.

en: Lee Kuan Yew and the Singapore model
def_zh: 《从第三世界到第一世界》：李光耀自述新加坡1965年被迫独立后的立国工程——廉洁高薪养贤的精英治理（meritocracy——与科举传统的现代对话）、组屋制度（居者有其屋）、中央公积金、双语政策（英语工作语+母语传承——对用户处境极具镜鉴）、严刑峻法与社会纪律、招商引资的发展型国家。“新加坡模式”成为威权发展主义的样板：中国改革者研究它，西方以它质问民主与增长的关系。
def_en: From Third World to First is the founder's own account of statecraft after unwanted independence in 1965: meritocratic, corruption-proofed governance (well-paid mandarins — the examination tradition modernised), near-universal public housing, the Central Provident Fund, bilingualism (English for work, mother tongue for roots — a policy with personal resonance for any bilingual professional), discipline by law, and courtship of multinationals. 'The Singapore model' became the exhibit in every debate on development without democracy — studied in Beijing, brandished in op-eds everywhere.

sources.chapter: From Third World to First (Lee Kuan Yew)

example: 邓小平1978年访新后的感叹与后来'借鉴新加坡'的官方表述，使这本书成为中国治理讨论的暗引文献——Economist 谈中新比较时总要引李光耀对中国的预言。
nuance: 贤能政治 = meritocracy（贝淡宁 political meritocracy 论争——链 [[imperial-examinations]]、[[western-civil-service]]）；“亚洲价值观”= Asian values（1990年代论战关键词）。组屋 = HDB flats；发展型国家链 [[japanese-miracle]]。城邦国家链 [[greek-city-states]] 的现代回声。
etymology: meritocracy 拉丁 meritum（应得）+ 希腊 kratos（权力）——1958年讽刺小说所造，今成中性词。

synonyms.sentence: A technocracy grades its rulers like civil servants.
Good governance, he argued, is measured at the kerbside.

en: Xiang Biao: body shopping, involution and 'the nearby'
def_zh: 《全球“猎身”》（Global Body Shopping，普林斯顿出版）：以印度IT劳务体系为对象的民族志——“猎身”指劳务行把程序员作为可全球调配的“身体”囤积转卖，揭示全球化劳动的抽象化机制。项飙其后成为中文公共讨论的关键声音：使“内卷”（involution——格尔茨农业内卷化概念的爆红转义：无发展的竞争加剧）、“悬浮”（suspension——为未来悬置当下）、“附近的消失”（the disappearing nearby）成为时代诊断词。中国学者以英文原创概念再反哺中文公共领域的标本。
def_en: Global Body Shopping — a Chinese anthropologist's Princeton-published ethnography of India's IT labour system, where agents warehouse and resell programmers as globally deployable 'bodies' — won the field's top prize and modelled how globalised labour is abstracted. Xiang then became the key public voice of Chinese self-diagnosis: rebooting Geertz's 'involution' as 内卷 (intensifying competition without development — the word of the decade), coining 'suspension' (living deferred for a future) and 'the disappearing nearby'. The loop is the point: a Chinese scholar minting concepts in English that then re-enter Chinese as common speech — your mapping project's ideal case study.
example: The Economist now uses 'involution' untranslated for China's rat-race discourse, paired with 'lying flat' (躺平) — two Chinese coinages that colonised English within five years, exactly the reverse traffic this knowledge base maps.
nuance: 内卷 = involution（格尔茨 agricultural involution→项飙转义→英语媒体回收）；躺平 = lying flat；附近 = the nearby。民族志 = ethnography。链 [[chaxugeju]]（中国概念入英语学术的前例）、[[imperial-examinations]]（内卷的科举史深层）。
etymology: involution 源自拉丁 involvere（向内卷）——格尔茨农业研究旧词，经项飙转义爆红。

synonyms.sentence: The rat race intensifies as the exits narrow.
Precarity is flexibility experienced from below.

zh: 李飞飞与 ImageNet（《我看见的世界》）
en: Fei-Fei Li, ImageNet and the deep-learning turn
def_zh: 《我看见的世界》：李飞飞自传——成都出生、16岁移民美国、洗衣店打工到斯坦福AI实验室主任。核心科学叙事：ImageNet（1500万标注图像数据集）押注“数据比算法更稀缺”，2012年AlexNet在其竞赛上突破，点燃深度学习革命；提出“AI的北极星”（North Star）研究观与以人为本AI（human-centered AI）。移民叙事+科学史+AI伦理三线——兼为励志读物与AI入门。
def_en: The Worlds I See braids memoir and science: Chengdu to New Jersey at sixteen, laundromat shifts to Stanford's AI lab — and the bet that made the deep-learning era: ImageNet, fifteen million labelled images, wagering that data, not algorithms, was the bottleneck, vindicated when AlexNet's 2012 win lit the fuse. Her framings — research 'North Stars', human-centered AI — now anchor the governance debate. As a bilingual immigrant-scientist narrative it reads like a companion volume to your own project.
example: 'Data is the new oil' arguments all cite ImageNet as proof-of-concept — and every AI-policy piece now toggles between 李飞飞 and Li Fei-Fei, a name whose two orders mark two worlds.
nuance: 深度学习 = deep learning；数据集 = dataset；以人为本的AI = human-centered AI（官方中译与中国政策语“以人为本”撞车——微妙的话语交叠）。链 [[information-age]]、[[science-two-bombs]] 钱学森（华人科学家美国叙事的两代对照）。
etymology: data 拉丁 dare（给予）的中性复数“被给予之物”+ set——数据即“所予”。

synonyms.sentence: Deep learning scaled when the data finally matched the ambition.
A benchmark turns progress into a leaderboard.

zh: 独立创业与自力更生（indie hacking）
en: bootstrapping and the indie maker canon
def_zh: 《make.》（Pieter Levels）：一人公司方法论——不融资（bootstrapping 自力更生）、快速发布（ship fast）、公开构建（build in public）、最小可行产品（MVP）、以副业矩阵试错、自动化到“躺赚”；Hormozi《百万美元模式》：报价设计（offer）、价值方程。与风投叙事相对的 indie hacker 文化——对用户的教师SaaS构想即操作手册。
def_en: Pieter Levels' make. is the one-person-company manual: no venture money (bootstrap), ship fast and often, build in public, MVP everything, run a portfolio of small bets, automate toward autonomy; Hormozi adds offer design and the value equation. The indie-hacker counterculture to VC's blitzscaling — and, practically, the operating manual for a teacher-built SaaS: your lesson-materials idea is exactly this book's target reader.
example: 'Build in public' turned Twitter threads into a business school — Levels livestreaming revenue dashboards is the genre's founding act, and the pedagogy is pure [[ultralearning]] directness.
nuance: 自力更生（bootstrap）的中文旧词新用饶有意味——毛时代口号变创业术语。最小可行产品 = MVP；产品市场匹配 = product-market fit。一人公司 = solopreneur/company of one。链 [[corporations-exchanges]]（相对面：不上市不融资）。
etymology: 源自谚语“拽自己的靴带把自己提起来”（by one's own bootstraps）——自力启动。

synonyms.sentence: A solopreneur automates what a firm would hire.
Ship the minimum viable product; let users write the roadmap.

en: Nietzsche: God is dead, will to power, Übermensch
def_zh: 《查拉图斯特拉如是说》及全集：上帝已死（现代性失去价值地基）、权力意志、超人（Übermensch）、永恒轮回、主人道德与奴隶道德——英语思想写作的高频引用源。
def_en: From Zarathustra and the collected works: God is dead (modernity loses its ground of value), the will to power, the Übermensch, eternal recurrence, master vs slave morality. English essayists quote him constantly, usually out of context.

sources.chapter: Thus Spoke Zarathustra / Nietzsche Collection (22 works)

etymology: Übermensch = über（在上）+ Mensch（人）——英译 superman 被漫画劫走后，学界改用 overman 或径用德文，一词的翻译史即接受史。

synonyms.sentence: Nihilism is the invoice that arrives after God's funeral.
Self-overcoming treats yesterday's self as raw material.

collocations: God is dead — and we have killed him
what doesn't kill me makes me stronger
example: Commentators reach for Nietzsche whenever a society keeps the morality after cancelling the metaphysics that underwrote it.
nuance: 尼采生前反民族主义、反反犹，其妹伪编遗稿使其被纳粹征用——引用尼采须防这段污染史。“上帝已死”非胜利宣言而是危机诊断，误读率极高。Zarathustra 即琐罗亚斯德：尼采故意让二元道德的发明者亲自出来收回它。

en: Kant: the Copernican revolution in philosophy
def_zh: 康德三大批判之首：心灵不是被动接收世界，而是以先天范畴（时间、空间、因果）构造经验——“哲学的哥白尼革命”。伦理学上的绝对命令（categorical imperative）：只按你愿意成为普遍法则的准则行动；人是目的，不是手段。
def_en: Mind does not copy the world; it constitutes experience through a priori categories — Kant's Copernican revolution. In ethics, the categorical imperative: act only on maxims you could will as universal law; treat persons as ends, never merely as means.

sources.chapter: 打开：周濂的100堂西方哲学课

etymology: critique 经法语借自希腊 kritikē（判别之术，krinein 分辨）——“批判”非攻击而是“划界”：理性为自己划定有效范围。

synonyms.sentence: A priori truths are certified before experience clocks in.
Universalisability asks: what if everyone did that?

example: Privacy advocates make a Kantian move: targeted ads treat users as means, never as ends.
nuance: 中文“批判”带贬义攻击色彩,康德的 Kritik 是中性“审查界限”——《纯粹理性批判》即“为纯粹理性划界”。绝对命令与孔子“己所不欲勿施于人”常被并举,但康德版是可普遍化检验,不是同理心——考试级差异。

en: Plato: the cave, the Forms, and eros
def_zh: 洞穴寓言：囚徒把火光投在墙上的影子当作实在——哲学是转身走向阳光的痛苦旅程。理念论（Forms）：可感世界是理念世界的摹本。《会饮篇》论爱欲（eros）：从爱一具身体上升到爱美本身——“柏拉图式爱情”的真正出处。
def_en: The cave: prisoners mistake shadows for reality; philosophy is the painful turn toward the sun. The theory of Forms: particulars copy eternal patterns. The Symposium's ladder of eros — from one body to Beauty itself — is what 'Platonic love' actually meant.

sources.chapter: Civilization #10: The Trial of Socrates and Plato's Allegory of the Cave
打开：周濂的100堂西方哲学课

etymology: eros（欲爱）、philia（友爱）、agape（圣爱）——希腊语三分“爱”,英语一个 love 全包,汉语“爱情/友情/大爱”反而更近希腊——三语对照的经典案例。

synonyms.sentence: Every filter bubble is a cave with better resolution.
Philosophical idealism ranks the blueprint above the building.

example: Whitehead's quip — all philosophy is footnotes to Plato — survives because the cave keeps getting new projectors.
nuance: “柏拉图式爱情”今指无性恋爱,原义是以爱欲为梯攀向理念——词义漂移两千年。洞穴寓言与庄子“井蛙不可语海”常并引,但柏拉图的重点是回到洞中救人（哲人的政治义务）,别漏后半段。

en: Simone Weil: gravity, grace and attention
def_zh: 法国哲学家-神秘主义者：重力（gravity）指灵魂下坠的自然倾向（自我中心、填补空虚）,神恩（grace）是唯一的反重力。核心概念“关注”（attention）：完全无我的注视即祈祷——“绝对纯粹的关注就是祈祷”。
def_en: Weil's physics of the soul: gravity is its natural downward drag (ego, void-filling); grace the only counterforce. Her master concept is attention — utterly selfless attention, she says, is prayer.
etymology: attention 源自拉丁 ad-（朝向）+ tendere（伸展）——“关注”即“朝向对象伸展自己”,薇依用词源本义。

synonyms.sentence: Attentiveness gives the other person the rarest gift: your absence.
Decreation is Weil's word for unmaking the ego God's way.

example: In an attention economy, Weil reads like sabotage: attention as the substance of prayer, not the inventory of platforms.
nuance: Weil 读音近法语“韦伊”/veɪ/,勿照英文拼读作“威尔”,也勿与社会学家马克斯·韦伯（Weber）混淆。她的 attention 与正念（mindfulness）不同:朝向他者与真理,而非朝向自身状态。

def_zh: 以“片段”（figures）写成的恋爱现象学：等待、焦灼、情书、吃醋——恋人是活在符号里的人。巴特是符号学（semiotics）大家,“作者已死”亦其名言。
def_en: A phenomenology of love written in fragments — waiting, jealousy, the love letter — the lover as a creature living inside signs. Barthes is semiotics' great stylist; 'the death of the author' is also his.
etymology: discourse 源自拉丁 discurrere（来回奔跑）——“话语”本义“跑来跑去”,恋人的心绪正是。

synonyms.sentence: Semiotics reads a rose as a sentence with thorns.
The beloved is a text the lover annotates obsessively.

example: Dating-app essays are Barthes with push notifications: the typing indicator is this century's figure of waiting.
nuance: 书名 fragments 是方法而非未完成——巴特拒绝把爱情写成体系。“作者已死”指意义由读者生产,不是文学职业的讣告,商业写作常误用。

zh: 亚隆存在主义心理治疗
def_zh: 欧文·亚隆把存在主义哲学变成临床框架：四个终极关怀——死亡（death）、自由（freedom）、孤独（isolation）、无意义（meaninglessness）。焦虑不是病症而是对存在事实的诚实反应。
def_en: Irvin Yalom turned existentialism into a clinical frame: four ultimate concerns — death, freedom, isolation, meaninglessness. Anxiety is not a malfunction but an honest response to the facts of existence.

sources.chapter: 存在主义心理治疗 (Irvin Yalom, Existential Psychotherapy)

etymology: exist 源自拉丁 ex-（出）+ sistere（站立）——“存在”即“站出来”:从背景中站出来面对自身。

synonyms.sentence: Mortality salience is the deadline that reprices every trivial worry.
Existential dread is freedom noticing its own price tag.

example: The Economist calls AI an 'existential risk' — Yalom would note the term migrated from the therapist's couch to the policy paper.
nuance: existential 一词已双轨:哲学-心理义（关乎存在体验）与安全政策义（关乎存亡,existential threat）——读英文时按语境切换,勿混。

def_zh: C.S.路易斯借希腊语四分英语的 love：storge（亲情/熟悉之爱）、philia（友爱）、eros（爱情）、agape/charity（无条件的圣爱）。《返璞归真》（Mere Christianity）为其神学入门书。
def_en: Lewis borrows Greek to split the English word love four ways: storge (affection), philia (friendship), eros (romantic love), agape or charity (unconditional love). Mere Christianity is his companion apologetics.

sources.chapter: The Four Loves / Mere Christianity (C.S. Lewis)

etymology: agape 希腊语“圣爱”借入英语后与 agape（张口惊愕,a-gape）拼写撞车——重音分义:/ˈæɡəpeɪ/ 是爱,/əˈɡeɪp/ 是张着嘴。

synonyms.sentence: In older English, charity meant agape — love, before it meant donations.
Affection is love grown in the soil of habit.

collocations: to love at all is to be vulnerable
example: Lewis's line — to love at all is to be vulnerable — gets quoted at weddings by people who skip the theology underneath it.
nuance: 英语一个 love 覆盖汉语的爱情/亲情/友情/大爱——与希腊四分对照,汉语学习者反而占优。KJV 圣经把 agape 译作 charity,故 charity 在古典英文里指“圣爱”而非慈善捐款。

def_zh: 荷兰神父卢云的核心概念：助人者不是从高处施与,而是以自己的伤口服侍他人的伤口——“负伤的治疗者”。另有 hospitality（款待:为陌生人腾出自由空间）与 solitude（独处≠孤独）。
def_en: Henri Nouwen's signature idea: the helper serves from shared woundedness, not from above. His hospitality means creating free space for the stranger; solitude is aloneness chosen, not suffered.

sources.chapter: The Wounded Healer / Reaching Out / Life of the Beloved (Henri Nouwen)

etymology: hospitality 源自拉丁 hospes（既是主人也是客人/陌生人）——hospital、hotel、host、hostile 同根:款待与敌意仅一线之隔,词源自带神学。

synonyms.sentence: Compassion — suffering-with — is sympathy that stays in the room.
Belovedness, for Nouwen, precedes achievement — the voice before the résumé.

example: Teacher-training now borrows the wounded healer without citation: the mentor who admits struggle reaches students the expert cannot.
nuance: wounded healer 原型出自荣格（希腊神话喀戎 Chiron:负伤的医神半人马）,卢云使其成为牧养与助人职业的通用语——教育、心理咨询文献高频词。

def_zh: 英语的第二语法：好撒玛利亚人（见义勇为者/好人法）、浪子回头（prodigal son）、大卫对歌利亚（以弱胜强）、大马士革路上（damascene conversion,幡然醒悟）、替罪羊（scapegoat）、洗手不干（wash one's hands）、墙上的字（writing on the wall,凶兆）——《经济学人》每期必用。
def_en: English's second grammar: the good Samaritan, the prodigal son, David and Goliath, the road to Damascus, the scapegoat, washing one's hands, the writing on the wall. The Economist cannot get through an issue without them.
etymology: scapegoat 为1530年廷代尔译经自造词:(e)scape + goat——利未记中承载众罪被逐旷野的羊;一次翻译发明了一个概念。

synonyms.sentence: The CEO's damascene conversion to green energy coincided with the subsidy.
Every startup pitch needs a Goliath; investors fund the slingshot.

collocations: the writing is on the wall
example: The writing was on the wall for the peg — Belshazzar's feast, rerun nightly on the currency desk.
nuance: 无需信仰,但不识典故读不懂英文评论——地位相当于汉语的成语典故系统。注意钦定本（KJV）措辞才是习语来源:the powers that be、salt of the earth、go the extra mile 皆 KJV 原文。

def_zh: 葛印卡系统的十日内观：观察呼吸与身体感受,体证三法印——无常（anicca）、苦（dukkha）、无我（anatta）;核心训练是平等心（equanimity）:不贪恋愉悦感受,不嗔拒不适感受。
def_en: Goenka's ten-day method: observe breath and bodily sensation until impermanence (anicca), unsatisfactoriness (dukkha) and non-self (anatta) stop being doctrines and become experience. The trained faculty is equanimity toward every sensation.

sources.chapter: The Art of Living: Vipassana Meditation (William Hart / S.N. Goenka)

etymology: vipassanā 巴利语 vi-（透彻）+ passanā（看）——“内观”即“看透”;anicca（无常）之 a- 为否定前缀+nicca（恒常）。

synonyms.sentence: Impermanence is the fine print on every pleasant sensation.
Corporate mindfulness kept the technique and returned the philosophy.

example: Tech executives book vipassana retreats the way their predecessors booked golf — and the noble silence is the real luxury good.
nuance: mindfulness 是内观去宗教化的出口产品——医疗化（MBSR）后丢弃了解脱论。与教材佛教单元对接:vipassana 自称保存了佛陀原始技术,与汉传禅宗（Zen 经日语入英）是不同法脉。

en: Bill Bryson: A Short History of Nearly Everything
def_zh: 科普写作的黄金标准：宇宙大爆炸到智人的全史,以幽默轶事讲硬科学——“你能读到此页,是无数代祖先在每一次灭绝中都恰好幸存”的惊叹法。《人体简史》（The Body）同法写人体。
def_en: The gold standard of popular science: from Big Bang to Homo sapiens, hard science carried by anecdote and awe. The Body does the same for anatomy — a guide for occupants.

sources.chapter: A Short History of Nearly Everything / The Body (Bill Bryson)

etymology: science 源自拉丁 scientia（知识,scire 知道）——19世纪前科学家自称 natural philosopher;scientist 为1833年新造词,比“科学”一词的日源汉译还早不了太多。

synonyms.sentence: Popular science translates the footnotes back into wonder.
Deep time makes the pyramids look like this morning.

collocations: in the grand scheme of things
example: Every editor since has commissioned 'a short history of' something — Bryson's title became a genre's template.
nuance: 布莱森是学英式幽默文体的绝佳教材:自嘲、轻描淡写（understatement）、括号插话——与海明威式极简相反的另一极英文审美。

def_zh: 从未上过学的摩门生存主义家庭女儿,自学考入杨百翰大学,终至剑桥博士——代价是与家庭决裂。核心英语概念:education as self-invention（教育即自我发明）;书名中译借圣经诗篇,原名只有一个词:Educated。
def_en: Raised by Mormon survivalists, never schooled, Westover self-studies into BYU and on to a Cambridge PhD — at the price of her family. Education as self-invention; the memoir as sociology.
etymology: memoir 借自法语 mémoire（记忆）——回忆录即“凭记忆作证”,与 memory、memorial 同根。

synonyms.sentence: Self-invention is education's most expensive elective.
Estrangement is the tuition her degrees quietly charged.

collocations: an education can be a wedge
example: Educated sits beside 金榜题名之后 on the same shelf: both ask what a degree costs the person who climbs through it.
nuance: 与《金榜题名之后》《学神》构成三角:美国版讲教育撕裂原生家庭,中国版讲文凭内部的分层与迷失——比较阅读价值极高。中译书名的诗意是译者添加,英文原题冷峻一词。

def_zh: 万斯回忆阿巴拉契亚白人工人阶级:瘾疾、离散家庭、习得性无助与“文化衰败论”。2016年被当作理解特朗普选民的解码书;作者后来成为副总统——书与人本身成了美国政治的教材。
def_en: Vance's memoir of Appalachia's white working class — addiction, family chaos, learned helplessness, and a culture-first diagnosis. Read in 2016 as the Trump-voter decoder ring; its author is now Vice-President, which makes the book a primary source twice over.
etymology: hillbilly = hill（山）+ Billy（人名泛称）——山地人的贬称被作者自我认领;elegy（挽歌）源自希腊 elegos 哀歌。

synonyms.sentence: The Rust Belt is deindustrialisation with a postcode.
'Left-behind' places vote to be remembered.

example: Every Economist piece on American populism still footnotes Hillbilly Elegy — now as both diagnosis and campaign biography.
nuance: 书的争议即其价值:文化归因（穷是习性）vs 结构归因（穷是去工业化）——与教材“共同富裕”单元、《置身事内》的区域差距议题对读。deaths of despair（绝望之死:自杀+阿片+酒精肝）为配套术语。

en: Four Thousand Weeks: time and finitude
def_zh: 伯克曼反生产力之书:人生约四千周,时间管理的真问题不是装下更多,而是接受装不下——有限性（finitude）。效率是陷阱:清空收件箱只会招来更多邮件;真正的选择是“战略性亏欠”。
def_en: Burkeman's anti-productivity book: a life is about four thousand weeks, and the real task is not fitting more in but accepting that most things won't fit — finitude. Efficiency is a trap; the empty inbox refills. Choose what to neglect, strategically.
etymology: finitude 源自拉丁 finis（边界、终点）——define、finish、finance 同根:定义、完成、清账,都是“划界”。

synonyms.sentence: Every yes is an unmarked funeral for a thousand other yeses.
The productivity trap rewards emptying the inbox by refilling it.

example: Four Thousand Weeks is Atomic Habits' loyal opposition: one optimises the system, the other asks why you boarded it.
nuance: 与《奇特的一生》（柳比歇夫时间统计法）正面相撞:一个把时间全部记账,一个论证记账本身即逃避——两书同读胜过各读十遍。

en: The 7 Habits: proactivity and the circle of influence
def_zh: 柯维的管理学圣经:主动积极（proactive,刺激与回应之间存在选择自由）、以终为始、要事第一、双赢思维、知彼解己、统合综效、不断更新。关键区分:关注圈 vs 影响圈——把能量花在影响圈。
def_en: Covey's canon: be proactive (between stimulus and response lies the freedom to choose), begin with the end in mind, first things first, think win-win, seek first to understand, synergise, sharpen the saw. Its sharpest tool: circle of concern vs circle of influence.

sources.chapter: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People (Stephen Covey)

etymology: proactive 为20世纪新造词:pro-（先）+ active——先于刺激而动;由弗兰克尔集中营心理学转入管理学,柯维使其成日常英语。

synonyms.sentence: Work the circle of influence and the circle of concern shrinks by itself.
Win-win became boardroom English; Covey supplied the grammar.

collocations: begin with the end in mind
example: Half of corporate English is Covey unattributed: win-win, proactive, synergy — the book dissolved into the language.
nuance: proactive/win-win/synergy 已因滥用而近陈词——写作中直接用会显平庸,识别它们的出处反而是修养。“主动积极”的哲学根在弗兰克尔《活出意义来》,比鸡汤深一层。

en: How to Win Friends and Influence People
def_zh: 1936年至今的社交技能元典:真诚关注他人、记住名字、让对方多说、由衷赞赏、永不争论——“赢得争论的唯一方法是避免争论”。中译名《人性的弱点》与原题《如何赢得朋友并影响他人》气质迥异。
def_en: The 1936 ur-text of social skill: take genuine interest, remember names, let the other person talk, praise honestly, never argue — 'the only way to win an argument is to avoid it.'

sources.chapter: How to Win Friends and Influence People (Dale Carnegie)

etymology: 作者原姓 Carnagey,改拼作 Carnegie 蹭钢铁大王安德鲁·卡内基之名——一次改拼即品牌史,与书的主题互文。

synonyms.sentence: Rapport is influence's down payment.
People skills compound faster than technical ones — Carnegie's wager.

collocations: a person's name is the sweetest sound
talk in terms of the other person's interests
example: The book's title entered English as a formula: 'How to win X and influence Y' headlines still pay it rent.
nuance: 中译《人性的弱点》暗示操纵,原书反复强调 sincere/honest——真诚是方法论前提而非道德装饰;这一中英书名差是绝佳翻译伦理案例。

en: Charlie Munger: the latticework of mental models
def_zh: 《穷查理宝典》:普世智慧=多学科思维模型的格栅（latticework）——用心理学、经济学、物理学的大模型交叉核验;反过来想,总是反过来想（inversion）;lollapalooza效应=多模型同向叠加的巨力。
def_en: Poor Charlie's Almanack: worldly wisdom is a latticework of mental models from many disciplines; invert, always invert; a lollapalooza is what happens when several models push the same direction at once.
etymology: inversion 源自拉丁 invertere（翻转）——芒格引数学家雅可比“反过来想”:证明不了幸福,就研究如何必然痛苦,然后避开。

synonyms.sentence: Inversion solves the problem by studying its funeral.
The circle of competence pays best at its centre and bankrupts at its rim.

collocations: to a man with a hammer
example: 'To a man with a hammer, everything looks like a nail' — Munger's line is now the standard indictment of single-model minds.
nuance: mental model 一词已被自媒体稀释;芒格原义强调跨学科+清单化核验,不是收藏概念卡片。与 index-investing 的关系微妙:芒格主动选股,却推荐普通人指数化——立场与建议分离,本身是个思维模型。

def_zh: 桥水创始人的操作系统:把人生与管理写成可执行的原则清单;极度求真+极度透明（radical truth & transparency）;创意择优（idea meritocracy）:按可信度加权表决;痛苦+反思=进步。
def_en: The Bridgewater operating system: codify life and management into written principles; radical truth and radical transparency; an idea meritocracy where votes are believability-weighted; pain plus reflection equals progress.
etymology: transparency 源自拉丁 trans（透过）+ parere（显现）——“透明”即“透过而可见”;radical 源自 radix（根）:彻底=从根上。

synonyms.sentence: Believability-weighted voting asks your track record before your opinion.
The ego barrier guards the exact door feedback needs to enter.

example: Dalio's machine metaphor divides readers: a firm run like an algorithm strikes some as utopia, others as HR dystopia.
nuance: radical transparency 在桥水含全程录音开会——中文语境常译“极度透明”而想象成“坦诚”,实际强度高得多。与科举节点的 meritocracy 相接:达利欧把它从选官搬进公司表决。

en: Naval Ravikant: leverage and specific knowledge
def_zh: 硅谷天使投资人的财富与幸福语录:特定知识（specific knowledge,无法培训他人替代的知识）;三种杠杆——劳动力、资本、以及零边际成本的复制杠杆（代码与媒体）;“靠出租时间无法致富”。
def_en: Naval's almanack: specific knowledge (what can't be trained into a replacement), and three kinds of leverage — labour, capital, and the permissionless kind with zero marginal cost: code and media. You won't get rich renting out your time.
etymology: leverage 源自 lever（杠杆）← 拉丁 levare（举起）——金融杠杆、政治筹码、人生杠杆共用一词,阿基米德的支点隐喻活在华尔街。

synonyms.sentence: Code and media are permissionless leverage: no one has to hire you.
Specific knowledge is found by following genuine curiosity, not job listings.

collocations: play long-term games with long-term people
seek wealth, not money or status
example: One teacher with a tutorial site out-leverages a department: Naval's media leverage, demonstrated at yunshugao.github.io.
nuance: 与《单干》《make.》同题异语:超级个体=specific knowledge×permissionless leverage——个人网站、课程、开源皆是复制杠杆;此节点即本知识库的自我说明。

def_zh: 豪泽尔:理财是行为问题而非知识问题。核心词——尾部事件（tails drive everything:极少数决定绝大部分回报）、“够了”（enough）、留足冗余（margin of safety）、财富是你看不见的那部分（wealth is what you don't see）。
def_en: Doing well with money is behaviour, not knowledge. Tails drive everything; know what 'enough' means; keep a margin of safety; wealth is the cars not bought — what you don't see.
etymology: enough 古英语 genōg——日耳曼老词;凯瑟琳·海勒对约瑟夫·海勒说“我们有 enough”——豪泽尔全书以这则轶事定调,词根即主题。

synonyms.sentence: Tail events write history while averages write reports.
Lifestyle inflation is a raise spent before it lands.

collocations: wealth is what you don't see
save like a pessimist, invest like an optimist
example: Housel's 'wealth is what you don't see' is the one-line refutation of every Instagram portfolio.
nuance: 与 personal-finance-classics 节点的《富爸爸》相反气质:豪泽尔反公式、重行为与运气叙事——两派对照读,理财观自现。margin of safety 借自格雷厄姆价值投资,词有师承。

en: information asymmetry: adverse selection & moral hazard
def_zh: 金融学教科书的两大核心摩擦:逆向选择（adverse selection,交易前——柠檬市场:劣质品驱逐优质品）与道德风险（moral hazard,交易后——投保者更敢冒险）。银行、保险、二手车市场的存在理由皆由此解释。
def_en: Finance's two master frictions: adverse selection (before the deal — Akerlof's lemons market) and moral hazard (after the deal — the insured take more risk). Banks and insurers exist to manage exactly these.
etymology: moral hazard 出自19世纪保险业行话——hazard 源自阿拉伯 az-zahr（骰子）经古法语入英:道德风险的词根是一枚骰子。

synonyms.sentence: Adverse selection means the customers keenest to buy insurance are the ones you least want.
In a lemons market, bad cars drive out good ones because buyers can't tell.

collocations: too big to fail invites moral hazard
example: Bailouts breed moral hazard: rescue a bank once and every bank borrows as if rescue were a standing facility.
nuance: moral hazard 无关道德败坏——是激励结构问题,中译“道德风险”易生误导。《经济学人》金融版每期至少一次;与教材“宏观调控”对接:监管即对两大摩擦的制度回应。

def_zh: 新州高考（HSC）经济学教材:贸易条件（terms of trade）、大宗商品周期、浮动汇率与澳元、经常账户逆差、劳资仲裁遗产、四大银行寡头。澳洲是“幸运”的资源出口小型开放经济体。
def_en: The HSC economics frame: terms of trade, the commodity cycle, the floating dollar, chronic current-account deficits, the arbitration legacy, four-bank oligopoly — a small open economy that digs and ships.

sources.chapter: Australia in the Global Economy (Dixon & O'Mahony)

etymology: commodity 源自拉丁 commodus（合宜、方便）——“商品”本义“便利之物”,在澳洲语境几乎专指铁矿石与煤。

synonyms.sentence: The commodity cycle writes Australia's budget in Beijing's construction data.
A small open economy imports its interest-rate weather.

collocations: the Australian dollar as a commodity currency
example: When iron ore sneezes, the federal budget catches cold — the terms of trade are Canberra's real treasurer.
nuance: 在澳教书者的本地化模块:HSC economics 的词汇即澳媒财经版词汇。与中国教材的镜像:中国买家即澳洲贸易条件的另一端——同一条船的两舷。

def_zh: 凯利《确定性的终结》提出的著名框架:立国的五根支柱——白澳政策、产业保护、劳资仲裁、国家家长主义、帝国庇护;1980年代霍克-基廷改革（浮动汇率、减关税、金融开放）将其逐一拆除,故曰“确定性的终结”。
def_en: Kelly's famous frame in The End of Certainty: Federation Australia rested on five pillars — White Australia, industry protection, wage arbitration, state paternalism, imperial benevolence. The Hawke–Keating reforms of the 1980s dismantled them; hence the end of certainty.
etymology: settlement 此处非“定居”而是“政治定约”(如1689年英国 settlement)——一词多义正是理解本框架的门槛。

synonyms.sentence: Protectionism was Federation Australia's civic religion, tariff by tariff.
Wage arbitration made the court, not the market, set the basic wage.

example: Every Australian policy debate since 1992 quotes Kelly: is this reform the settlement's funeral or its sequel?
nuance: 与霍恩《幸运之国》构成澳洲政治评论的两大典故:Horne 讽“靠运气”,Kelly 记“靠改革”。White Australia 支柱与中国教材华工史对接——排华法案即定约的第一根柱,澳中关系史的暗线。

en: Australian politics: Westminster with compulsory voting
def_zh: 威斯敏斯特体制的澳洲变体:强制投票（不投票罚款,投票率95%+）、偏好排序投票制（preferential voting）、参众两院、联邦制、总督代表王室;“民主香肠”（democracy sausage）为投票日文化图腾。
def_en: Westminster, antipodean edition: compulsory voting (fines for abstention, 95%+ turnout), preferential voting, two houses, federalism, a Governor-General for the Crown — and the democracy sausage as election-day liturgy.

sources.chapter: Australian Politics For Dummies / Law in Australian Society (Hardy)

etymology: Westminster 为伦敦议会所在地名转体制名——地名变普通名词,与 Wall Street、Whitehall 同一构词法。

synonyms.sentence: Compulsory voting drags the indifferent middle to the booth — and to the centre.
A hung parliament makes independents the most popular people in Canberra.

example: Compulsory plus preferential voting explains why Australian politics fights for the middle: the extremes are already counted.
nuance: 与教材“全过程人民民主”单元对照:两种对投票率问题的制度回答。1975年宪政危机（总督解职总理）是英式虚位元首理论的著名反例——澳洲宪法课必考。

zh: 英文世界的中国经济学
def_zh: 克罗伯《中国经济》与金刻羽《新中国策》:英文世界解释中国增长模式的标准词汇——投资驱动增长、土地财政、金融抑制（financial repression）、地方政府锦标赛、再平衡（rebalancing）、“市长经济”（mayor economy）。
def_en: Kroeber's China's Economy and Keyu Jin's New China Playbook supply English's standard vocabulary for the model: investment-led growth, land finance, financial repression, the local-official tournament, rebalancing, the mayor economy.

sources.chapter: China's Economy (Kroeber) / The New China Playbook (Keyu Jin)

etymology: repression（抑制）源自拉丁 reprimere（压回）——financial repression 指人为压低存款利率以补贴投资,术语自带批评立场。

synonyms.sentence: Financial repression taxes savers invisibly and lends the proceeds to concrete.
Investment-led growth builds tomorrow's capacity with yesterday's deposits.

example: Reading Kroeber beside 《置身事内》 is stereoscopic: the same land-finance machine, described from outside and inside.
nuance: 同一事实两套修辞:中文教材说“集中力量办大事”,英文文献说 state capacity 或 financial repression——学会双向翻译立场,才算读懂双方。

en: The Man Who Changed China: the Jiang era
def_zh: 库恩的英文传记:市场化闯关的1990年代——三个代表（Three Represents,吸纳企业家入党）、国企改制、入世谈判、上海帮。英文报道的固定词汇:paramount leader、princeling、technocrat。
def_en: Kuhn's authorised biography covers the 1990s dash: the Three Represents (letting entrepreneurs into the party), SOE restructuring, WTO accession. It fixed the English lexicon: paramount leader, princeling, technocrat.

sources.chapter: The Man Who Changed China (Robert Lawrence Kuhn)

etymology: paramount 源自古法语 par amont（在上方）——paramount leader 为英媒为无正式最高头衔的实权者所造的固定译法。

synonyms.sentence: The Three Represents rewrote the party's guest list to include its former class enemies.
Princeling is English's one-word gloss on red aristocracy.

example: Kuhn's biography reads as the authorised English voiceover of the era 《朱镕基讲话实录》 documents from inside.
nuance: authorised biography 的立场需折算;但其词汇即彭博、《经济学人》中国版词汇——学“他们如何称呼我们熟悉的事物”,此书是标本。与 zhu-rongji-reforms 节点同期互补。

def_zh: 品味即阶级:惯习（habitus,内化为身体的阶级性情）、文化资本、场域（field）——审美偏好是社会位置的标记而非天性;“区分”即以品味划界的永恒游戏。
def_en: Taste is class: habitus (class dispositions worn as second nature), cultural capital, fields. Aesthetic preference marks social position while claiming to be personal; distinction is the endless game of drawing lines with taste.
etymology: habitus 拉丁语“持有的状态、习性”直借——与 habit 同根而学术分工:habit 是个人习惯,habitus 是阶级刻进身体的姿态。

synonyms.sentence: Cultural capital is inheritance that clears customs as personality.
Symbolic violence makes the ranking feel like taste, even to the ranked.

example: Why latte choices predict votes: Bourdieu's Distinction, rerun weekly as data journalism.
nuance: 《金榜题名之后》《学神》的理论后台即布迪厄——文化资本、惯习是两书的分析引擎;先读此节点再读那两本,脚手架全出。

en: Yi-Fu Tuan: topophilia, space and place
def_zh: 华裔人文地理学宗师段义孚:恋地情结（topophilia,人与地方的情感纽带）;空间（space,自由与开放）与地方（place,安全与依附）的辩证——“空间+经验=地方”。人文主义地理学的奠基词汇。
def_en: Yi-Fu Tuan founded humanistic geography's vocabulary: topophilia, the affective bond between people and place; and the dialectic of space (freedom, openness) and place (security, attachment) — space becomes place as we know it and endow it with value.

sources.chapter: Topophilia / Space and Place / 我是谁？段义孚自传 (Yi-Fu Tuan)

etymology: topophilia = 希腊 topos（地方）+ philia（爱）——段义孚自造词;topic、topology、utopia 同根:话题本义“处所”。

synonyms.sentence: A sense of place is geography felt from the inside.
Place attachment is why demolition notices read like bereavements.

collocations: home as the centre of meaning
example: GIS measures space; Tuan explains why the demolished 胡同 was a place — the layer no shapefile carries.
nuance: 与用户 GIS 训练互补的另一半地理学:计量革命 vs 人文主义。段义孚英文写作以文体优美著称——地理学者中的散文家,其自传亦是移民与身份的文本。

def_zh: 华莱士-威尔斯的气候警世书:“比你想的更糟,糟得多”——级联效应（cascades）、热死亡、气候难民、碳预算;新词汇:climate doomism（气候末日论）与其批评者。
def_en: Wallace-Wells's opening line — it is worse, much worse, than you think — introduced cascade thinking to lay readers: compounding feedbacks, heat death, climate refugees, carbon budgets; and the backlash coined climate doomism.
etymology: cascade 源自意大利 cascare（跌落）——瀑布转喻连锁反应;气候语境指反馈回路互相触发的雪崩式恶化。

synonyms.sentence: A tipping point is the last moment the door was a door.
The carbon budget is an allowance humanity spends like an heir.

example: Doomism or due diligence? Every climate op-ed since 2019 positions itself relative to Wallace-Wells.
nuance: 与教材“生态文明/人地协调”单元同题,修辞相反:教材讲治理方案,此书讲失败情景——议论文正反两面的现成弹药库。

def_zh: 里普利:好冲突（good conflict,有摩擦有出口）会退化为高冲突（high conflict,自我延续的我们vs他们漩涡）;冲突企业家（conflict entrepreneurs）以煽动为业;出路是复杂化叙事（complicating the narrative）。艾迪补充人格视角:高冲突人格的识别。
def_en: Ripley: good conflict (friction with an exit) degrades into high conflict — a self-sustaining us-versus-them vortex, stoked by conflict entrepreneurs. The way out is complicating the narrative. Eddy adds the personality lens: spotting high-conflict people.

sources.chapter: High Conflict (Amanda Ripley) / 5 Types of People Who Can Ruin Your Life (Bill Eddy)

etymology: conflict 源自拉丁 confligere（互相撞击）——冲突本义“对撞”;entrepreneur 借自法语“承办人”:冲突企业家=承办冲突的人。

synonyms.sentence: Polarisation is high conflict scaled to a nation.
A conflict entrepreneur sells firewood and calls it weather.

collocations: the la brea tar pits of conflict
example: Teachers meet high conflict weekly: the playground feud that survives every apology is a vortex, not a dispute.
nuance: 教师职业直接可用:行为管理文献的 de-escalation 与此书同源。与教材“矛盾论”对照:辩证法视矛盾为发展动力,里普利分好坏——同词异构,translation trap。

def_zh: 鲍尔比-安斯沃思传统的成人应用:安全型、焦虑型、回避型依恋——童年照料模式成为成年亲密关系的操作系统。《Attached》普及三型配对动力;米勒教科书与《Platonic》（友谊版）扩展全景。
def_en: Bowlby and Ainsworth, applied to adults: secure, anxious and avoidant attachment — childhood care becomes the operating system of adult intimacy. Attached popularised the pairing dynamics; Miller's textbook and Platonic (friendship) complete the map.
etymology: attachment 源自古法语 atachier（钉住、系上）——依恋即“被系上”;安全依恋是系得稳,不是系得紧。

synonyms.sentence: A secure base is the harbour that makes exploring possible.
The anxious-avoidant trap pairs the pursuer with the escape artist, indefinitely.

example: Dating apps run on attachment vocabulary now — 'avoidant' has gone from journal article to first-date accusation.
nuance: 流行语滥用警告:attachment style 非星座,可随经验改变（earned security）。教师视角:安全依恋即教室里的 secure base——与创伤知情教学（trauma-psychology 节点）直接相连。

def_zh: 剑桥手册的核心:双通道（视觉+听觉）、有限容量、主动加工三假设;十二原理——一致性（删冗余）、信号化、临近（文字贴图）、分段、个人化语气等。多媒体教师的科学地基。
def_en: The Cambridge Handbook's core: dual channels, limited capacity, active processing — hence the twelve principles: coherence (cut the decorative), signalling, contiguity (words beside pictures), segmenting, personalisation. The science under every slide deck.

sources.chapter: The Cambridge Handbook of Multimedia Learning (Mayer & Fiorella)

etymology: multimedia = 拉丁 multus（多）+ medium（中间物、媒介）——媒介本义“居间者”:在知识与心灵之间。

synonyms.sentence: The coherence principle fires the dancing clip-art: seductive details tax learning.
Dual coding sends words and pictures down separate lanes so neither jams.

example: Your IST slides obey Mayer or fight him: narrate the diagram, don't caption-and-read it — the redundancy effect is real.
nuance: 直接服务 9/10IST Multimedia 教学:评估学生作品可用十二原理作 rubric 维度。与 instructional-science 节点（Rosenshine 侧）合为认知负荷教学法全图。

en: behaviour management: routines before rapport before rules
def_zh: 罗杰斯（最少侵入干预、战术性忽略、修复式跟进）、黄（开学头两周立程序）、马扎诺（证据基础）、西格尔（先连接后纠正）——英语教育界的行为管理词汇群:routine、de-escalation、restorative practice、take-up time。
def_en: Bill Rogers (least-intrusive intervention, tactical ignoring, repair and rebuild), Wong (the first days establish procedures), Marzano (the evidence base), Siegel (connect before you correct). The working lexicon: routines, de-escalation, restorative practice, take-up time.

sources.chapter: Bill Rogers 行为管理系列 / The First Days of School (Wong) / Classroom Management That Works (Marzano) / No-Drama Discipline (Siegel)

etymology: discipline 源自拉丁 discipulus（学生,discere 学习）——“纪律”与“学科”同词:纪律本义是“使可教”,不是惩罚。

synonyms.sentence: Restorative practice asks who was harmed, not only which rule broke.
Tactical ignoring starves the secondary behaviour while the primary instruction continues.

example: Give the direction, give take-up time, move away — Rogers in one sentence, and the difference between a request and a standoff.
nuance: discipline 词源即立场:使可学,非使痛苦——与“没有规矩不成方圆”对译时注意英语文献重程序与修复,轻惩戒;NSW 学校话语（PBL/restorative）全在此谱系。

def_zh: 澳洲学校生成式AI框架的政策词汇:学术诚信（academic integrity）、AI素养、提示工程入课堂、评估重设计（assessment redesign,过程重于成品）、隐私与数据主权;AIED 文献的两面:个性化导师 vs 作弊恐慌。
def_en: The Australian Framework's policy lexicon: academic integrity, AI literacy, prompt engineering as classroom skill, assessment redesign (process over product), privacy and data sovereignty. The AIED literature splits between personal-tutor hopes and plagiarism panic.

sources.chapter: Australian Framework for Generative AI in Schools / AI in Education (Khine; Al-Marzouqi et al.)

etymology: integrity 源自拉丁 integer（完整、未触碰的——数学“整数”同词）——学术诚信即“作品的完整性”:何为“自己的”工作,AI 时代重新开题。

synonyms.sentence: AI literacy is knowing what the model can't know.
Assessment redesign moves the marks from the essay to the evidence of thinking.

collocations: academic integrity in the AI era
example: The framework's real question lands on your desk each term: is this task testing what the student can do, or what the model can?
nuance: 与教师工作直接相关:NESA 与联邦框架的措辞差异需追踪;“detection 军备竞赛已输,重设计评估”是文献共识——引用时注意年份,该领域半年一换代。

en: algorithms: Big-O and the classic shelf
def_zh: CLRS《算法导论》、塞奇威克、《图解算法》、佩措尔德《编码》:大O记号（渐进复杂度）、分治、贪心、动态规划、数据结构;《编码》以电报与继电器讲透抽象层级——比特如何一路搭成计算机。
def_en: CLRS, Sedgewick, Grokking Algorithms, and Petzold's Code: Big-O notation, divide-and-conquer, greedy, dynamic programming, data structures — and Code's masterclass in abstraction layers, from telegraph relays to a working computer.

sources.chapter: Introduction to Algorithms (CLRS) / Algorithms (Sedgewick) / Grokking Algorithms / Code (Petzold)

etymology: algorithm 源自9世纪巴格达数学家花剌子模（al-Khwārizmī）的拉丁化名——一位波斯学者的名字成了计算机科学的地基词;algebra 出自其书名 al-jabr。

synonyms.sentence: Big-O prices an algorithm by how it scales, not how it sprints.
Every abstraction layer is a promise: you may forget what's below.

example: 花剌子模 to House of Wisdom to CS degree: your algorithms course footnotes the Baghdad translation movement.
nuance: 对接 UT Austin CS 课程与教材“逻辑与思维”:算法即形式化推理。词源链 al-Khwārizmī→algorithm 连通 house-of-wisdom 节点——历史与代码同网。

def_zh: 彼得森《理解曝光》与弗里曼《摄影师之眼》:光圈（aperture,景深）、快门（shutter speed,动感）、感光度（ISO,噪点）的三角权衡;构图词汇——三分法、引导线、负空间、决定性瞬间。
def_en: Peterson's Understanding Exposure and Freeman's The Photographer's Eye: the aperture–shutter–ISO triangle (depth of field, motion, noise), and the composition lexicon — rule of thirds, leading lines, negative space, the decisive moment.

sources.chapter: Understanding Exposure (Peterson) / The Photographer's Eye (Freeman) 及摄影书群

etymology: photography = 希腊 phōs/phōt-（光）+ graphein（书写）——“以光书写”;aperture 源自拉丁 aperire（打开）:光圈即“开口”。

synonyms.sentence: Depth of field decides what the picture is about by deciding what blurs.
Cartier-Bresson's decisive moment is composition meeting luck halfway.

example: Teach the triangle as a budget: every stop of light is spent on freezing motion, carving depth, or keeping the shadows clean.
nuance: 10IST Multimedia 的直接词汇库;中英术语对齐要点:光圈值 f 数越小开口越大——中文“大光圈”=英文 wide/fast aperture,数字反而小,学生高频错点。

en: design thinking: prototype your way forward
def_zh: 斯坦福d.school方法论,《人生设计课》将其用于生涯:同理（empathise）、定义、发想（ideate）、原型（prototype）、测试;重构问题（reframe）、奥德赛计划（三个五年人生原型）、“选择建构”对抗完美主义。
def_en: The d.school loop — empathise, define, ideate, prototype, test — applied by Designing Your Life to careers: reframe the problem, sketch three Odyssey Plans, prototype conversations before leaping. Bias to action over analysis.

sources.chapter: Designing Your Life (Burnett & Evans) / 人生设计课 / From Zero to UI-UX Hero

etymology: prototype = 希腊 prōtos（第一）+ typos（压印、模子）——原型即“第一次压印”;type、typo 同根:打字与模子一家。

synonyms.sentence: Reframing turns 'find my passion' into 'run three cheap experiments'.
Iteration is failure amortised into instalments.

example: Y7 Tech's design process IS design thinking descaled: NESA's 'identify-produce-evaluate' loop and the d.school pentagon are cousins.
nuance: 与教材/NESA 的 design process 术语对齐是教学刚需:empathise≈needs analysis,ideate≈发散思维。管理学滥用警告:design thinking 作口号时常只剩便利贴。

def_zh: 约翰斯通《即兴》的核心发现:一切对话都是地位交易（status transaction）——人无时不在微调高位/低位姿态;“Yes, and”原则:接受并叠加。多内兰《演员与目标》、林克莱特《释放天性的声音》补全表演三角。
def_en: Johnstone's Impro: every conversation is a status transaction — we play ourselves up or down moment to moment. 'Yes, and' accepts the offer and builds. Donnellan's Actor and the Target and Linklater's voice work complete the triangle.

sources.chapter: Impro (Keith Johnstone) / The Actor and the Target (Donnellan) / Freeing the Natural Voice (Linklater)

etymology: improvise 源自拉丁 improvisus（未预见的:in-否定+pro-先+videre看）——即兴即“未先看过”;status 拉丁语“站立的姿态”:地位本义是站姿,约翰斯通照字面用。

synonyms.sentence: Watch any staff meeting as status transactions and the agenda becomes subtitles.
'Yes, and' is acceptance weaponised into momentum.

example: Classroom management is applied Johnstone: the teacher who can drop status voluntarily owns the room's see-saw.
nuance: status 此处非社会阶层而是须臾之间的姿态博弈——与布迪厄的结构性地位互补:一个论毫秒,一个论世代。教师、演讲者、面试者的实操心理学。

def_zh: 梅尔维尔1851年巨著:亚哈船长以全船殉其对白鲸的复仇。英语中 white whale 已成“毁灭性执念的对象”代名词;开篇三词 Call me Ishmael 是英语文学最著名的第一句。
def_en: Melville's Ahab spends his ship and crew on vengeance against a whale. A 'white whale' now means any ruinous obsession; 'Call me Ishmael' is the most famous opening line in English.
etymology: Ahab（亚哈）取自《圣经·列王纪》的邪王之名——梅尔维尔以命名预告结局;Ishmael（以实玛利）为被逐的庶子:叙事者自报家门即自称局外人。

synonyms.sentence: Cold fusion is physics' white whale: forever sighted, never landed.
Monomania is focus that has eaten its owner.

example: The merger became the CEO's white whale: each failed bid only sharpened the harpoon.
nuance: 商业英语高频:one's white whale 指求而不得的大客户/大目标,通常暗含“追逐本身将毁你”的警告——引用时勿只取“目标远大”义。全书三分之一是鲸类学章节,读原著者自会遇到这份十九世纪式的百科耐心。

def_zh: 美国南方文学流派:衰败庄园、畸零人（grotesques）、暴烈的恩典。奥康纳《好人难寻》:平庸之恶遇上枪口下的顿悟;麦卡勒斯《伤心咖啡馆之歌》:爱者与被爱者的不对等定律。
def_en: Decaying gentry, grotesques, violent grace. O'Connor's A Good Man Is Hard to Find puts banal selfishness before a gun-barrel epiphany; McCullers' Ballad of the Sad Café states the law that the lover and the beloved come from different countries.

sources.chapter: A Good Man Is Hard to Find (O'Connor) / 伤心咖啡馆之歌 (McCullers 中英本)

etymology: grotesque 源自意大利 grottesca（洞窟壁画风格,grotta 洞穴）——“怪诞”的词根是出土罗马洞窟里的奇异壁画。

synonyms.sentence: The grotesque exaggerates the body to X-ray the soul.
O'Connor grants each character one moment of grace, usually at gunpoint.

collocations: a good man is hard to find
the heart is a lonely hunter
example: 麦卡勒斯在中文世界的持续走红(李文俊译本)使'伤心咖啡馆'成为中文文青词汇——南方哥特完成了跨语迁徙。
nuance: 与鲁迅的国民性书写对读:都以畸零人示众,但奥康纳的地基是天主教救赎论——grace 一词在她处是神学术语,非“优雅”。

def_zh: 1948年《纽约客》史上最大退订潮的短篇:小镇每年抽签石刑一人,无人记得为何——传统即免检的暴力。scapegoating（替罪羊机制）的文学标本,与勒庞群体心理学、基拉尔模仿理论共用词汇。
def_en: The 1948 story that broke The New Yorker's cancellation record: a village stones one member yearly, reason long forgotten — tradition as unexamined violence. The literary specimen of scapegoating.

sources.chapter: The Lottery and Other Stories (Shirley Jackson)

etymology: lottery 源自日耳曼 lot（签、份额）——lot 亦入 allotment（份地）、one's lot in life（命份）:抽签与命运同词根,杰克逊的书名一词双关。

synonyms.sentence: Scapegoating outsources a community's guilt to one address.
Mob mentality is arithmetic that divides conscience by headcount.

example: Online pile-ons rerun The Lottery daily: the stones are quote-tweets and no one remembers the original charge.
nuance: 与《蝇王》同年代同母题（文明外壳之薄）,但杰克逊的恐怖在于无退化过程——秩序本身即刑场。教学常并读二者+米尔格拉姆实验。

def_zh: 笛福1719年小说被经济学征用:单人经济体是微观经济学的标准思想实验（生产可能性、时间配置、比较优势在星期五登岛后启动）;马克思讥之为“鲁滨逊漂流记式”的原子化人性假设。
def_en: Defoe's castaway became economics' standard thought experiment: a one-agent economy for production choices, then comparative advantage once Friday arrives. Marx mocked 'Robinsonades' as capitalism projecting its atomised man backwards.
etymology: Robinsonade（鲁滨逊体漂流小说）——一部小说派生出文类名词,与 utopia、quixotic 同属“书名变词汇”家族。

synonyms.sentence: Autarky is Crusoe's island scaled to a nation, shipwreck included.
Homo economicus is Crusoe with a utility function and no theology.

example: Every intro-econ course maroons a student on Crusoe's island before letting markets exist — one agent, all trade-offs.
nuance: man Friday（得力助手）已入日常英语,但殖民意味使其渐敏感。经济学的鲁滨逊删除了原著的清教忏悔叙事——小说本是宗教文本,教科书只留下理性人。

zh: 里尔克《给青年诗人的信》
def_zh: 十封信的核心劝告:活在问题里（live the questions now）——不要急索答案;检验创作冲动的唯一标准:“不写会死吗?”;孤独是必须守护的财产。英语毕业致辞与写作课的引用富矿。
def_en: Ten letters, one counsel: live the questions now — do not hunt answers you could not yet live. The single test of a calling: must I write? Solitude is property to be defended. Commencement speeches mine it annually.
etymology: vocation 源自拉丁 vocare（呼唤）——“志业”即“被召唤”;里尔克把职业选择还原为听觉问题:里面有没有那个声音。

synonyms.sentence: A vocation is a job that would grieve you by its absence.
Rilke's solitude is not loneliness but studio space for the self.

example: 'Letters to a Young X' is now a genre — economists, contrarians and chefs all borrow Rilke's envelope.
nuance: 与 yiyun-li 节点相连:李翊云的书名 Dear Friend, from My Life I Write to You in Your Life 正是里尔克式书信传统的当代回声。“活在问题里”亦是本知识库的方法论。

en: Greco-Latin word roots (Word Power Made Easy)
def_zh: 刘易斯的经典方法:以希腊拉丁词根批量解锁词汇——ego(我)、verto(转)、dico(说)、anthropos(人)、misein(恨)→ egoist, introvert, misanthrope, philanthropist… 一个词根一串词,本知识库每个节点的 etymology 栏即此法。
def_en: Norman Lewis's engine: unlock vocabulary in batches through Greek and Latin roots — one root, a family of words. The etymology field on every node in this site runs on exactly this method.

sources.chapter: Word Power Made Easy (Norman Lewis, 中英对照版)

etymology: etymology 源自希腊 etymon（真义）+ logos——词源学即“求词的真身”;汉字学的“说文解字”是其完全平行:两大文明各自的词根学。

synonyms.sentence: A morpheme is the smallest brick meaning is built from.
Cognates are words that kept in touch after the family scattered.

example: Learn verto once — invert, convert, extrovert, versatile, vertigo arrive free: compound interest, lexical edition.
nuance: 书名直译“轻松掌握词汇力”,中文界常称“英语说文解字”——这个译名本身道破方法论同构。警惕民间词源（folk etymology）:好故事未必真历史,本库词源栏均取学界通说。

en: Study Gods: the elite student taxonomy
def_zh: 姜以琳对北京顶尖中学的民族志:学神（轻松高分）、学霸（苦读高分）、学渣（不学低分）、学弱（苦读低分）——地位由“成绩÷努力”决定,毫不费力是最高贵。精英再生产的中国剧本,英文学界的关键新词。
def_en: Yi-Lin Chiang's ethnography of elite Beijing schools: study gods (effortless top scores), studyholics (effortful top scores), underachievers and losers — status equals results divided by visible effort; ease is nobility. China's script of elite reproduction, now anglophone sociology's vocabulary.
etymology: 学神 直译 study god 被英文书保留——中文校园分类学输出为英语学术词,与 involution（内卷）同批出海。

synonyms.sentence: Effortless perfection is the duck gliding while the feet are censored.
Elite reproduction is inheritance laundered through examinations.

example: The study-god ideal is Bourdieu in school uniform: effortlessness certifies that excellence is nature, hence unchallengeable.
nuance: 与 jinbang-after 是同一现象的两端:《学神》看精英中学的地位生产,《金榜题名之后》看寒门学生进大学后的迷失——合读即中国教育分层全景;Educated 提供美国对照组。

def_zh: 《秧歌》:土改后饥饿乡村的小说,张爱玲以英文先写（The Rice-Sprout Song）再自译中文——中英双语自写自译的罕见个案。金句体（“生命是一袭华美的袍”）使其成为中文金句文化的祖师之一。
def_en: The Rice-Sprout Song — hunger in a post-land-reform village — was written by Chang in English first, then self-translated into Chinese: a rare case of bidirectional self-translation. Her aphoristic style made her the patron saint of the Chinese quotable sentence.
etymology: aphorism 源自希腊 aphorizein（划界定义）——金句即“一句话划定一个真理的边界”;张爱玲金句的英文对应体是 Wilde 式 epigram。

synonyms.sentence: Self-translation lets the author betray the original with authority.
An epigram is wisdom in evening dress.

example: 张爱玲与李翊云、纳博科夫同属换语写作谱系——但她是双向的:同一本书,两种母语级文本。
nuance: 《秧歌》因题材在陆港台接受史迥异——文学价值与政治接受的分离案例。夏志清英文《中国现代小说史》将其抬入正典:英语学界反哺中文文学史的著名回环。

en: Liu Yu: politics in plain Chinese
def_zh: 政治学者的杂文集:以日常语言拆解民主、自由、制度——“观念的水位”是其核心比喻(制度变迁跟随观念水位上涨)。中文公共写作把政治学常识化的代表作。
def_en: A political scientist's essays that translate democracy, liberty and institutions into everyday Chinese. Her master metaphor: the water level of ideas — institutions move when the tide of assumptions rises.
etymology: essay 源自法语 essai（尝试,蒙田自谦其文为“试笔”）——杂文/随笔的西方祖源即“试”;刘瑜文体正是蒙田-奥威尔谱系的中文支流。

synonyms.sentence: An op-ed is a water-level reading taken in eight hundred words.
Civic literacy is knowing the rules of the game you were born into.

example: 刘瑜之于中文读者,近似奥威尔《政治与英语》之于英文读者:把政治写回人话。
nuance: 阅读价值在文体示范:政治学术语的日常化转写——正是本知识库中→英方向的反向操作(英→中的降维表达)。

en: Li Xiaolai: attention over time over money
def_zh: 新东方名师转比特币巨鲸的方法论书:注意力>时间>金钱的估值排序;“个人商业模式升级”——同一份时间出售多次(写书、课程);“活在未来”;元认知反复打磨概念。中文互联网自我提升话语的源头之一。
def_en: From TOEFL teacher to bitcoin whale: value attention above time above money; upgrade your personal business model by selling the same hours many times (books, courses); live in the future. A wellspring of Chinese internet self-improvement discourse.
etymology: attention economy 一词由诺奖得主西蒙1971年预言(“信息的丰富造成注意力的贫乏”)——李笑来的排序是其个人财务版。

synonyms.sentence: Upgrading your personal business model means firing yourself from hourly work.
In the attention economy, your focus is the commodity being mined.

collocations: 注意力是最宝贵的财富
example: Naval 与李笑来是同一学说的英中双声道:specific knowledge×杠杆 vs 注意力×个人商业模式。
nuance: 作者其人争议极大(ICO 风波、录音门)——方法论与人品分账处理;此节点收其概念框架,不作背书。

en: the super individual: a company of one
def_zh: 《单干》等书界定的中文互联网概念:一人=一家公司——以工具、自动化与个人品牌获得团队级杠杆;认知→变现→流量→产品→组织(外包/AI)的单干路线图。英语对应词:solopreneur, company of one, one-person business。
def_en: The Chinese internet's 超级个体: one person operating with a team's leverage through tools, automation and personal brand. English equivalents: solopreneur, company of one, the one-person business.

sources.chapter: 单干：成为超级个体的49个关键动作 (陈欢)

etymology: individual 源自拉丁 individuus（不可分割:in-否定+dividere分）——“个体”本义“不可再分之物”;“超级个体”反用其义:一个不可分的人,分出一支队伍的产能。

synonyms.sentence: A company of one asks 'how big is enough?' before 'how big is possible?'
The super individual's leverage stack: code, content, capital, and now agents.

example: This very knowledge base is a super-individual artefact: one teacher, one AI, a publishing pipeline that once needed a department.
nuance: 即用户的自我目标(超级个体):此节点是知识库的自我指涉锚点。中文概念偏宏大叙事,英文 company of one(Jarvis)反增长哲学更克制——两种气质,同一结构。

en: Zhu Shenghao: translating Shakespeare under bombs
def_zh: 在贫病与战火中译出31部莎剧的天才译者,情书与译稿同为传世文本(“醒来觉得甚是爱你”)。中国翻译史的殉道者原型:译稿两度毁于日军轰炸,重译至死,年仅32。
def_en: Zhu translated 31 Shakespeare plays through poverty, war and tuberculosis, twice losing manuscripts to Japanese bombing and retranslating until his death at 32. His love letters are themselves canonical prose.
etymology: translate 拉丁“携带渡过”——朱生豪是字面意义的摆渡人:一人把莎士比亚渡入汉语,船沉两次,泅渡至死。

synonyms.sentence: A labour of love is work whose wage is the work.
His magnum opus was rebuilt twice from ash and memory.

example: 读莎剧中译即读朱生豪——正如读朱生豪情书即读一个人如何把爱与译业活成同一件事。
nuance: 与 daodejing-english 节点镜像:理雅各英译中典,朱生豪中译英典——双向摆渡的两座灯塔。梁实秋译本为其学院派对照(全但淡,朱译烈而漏)。

def_zh: 格拉宁《奇特的一生》:苏联昆虫学家柳比歇夫56年逐日记录每项活动耗时(精确到分钟),月结年审——时间统计法。中文效率圈的圣典;“他一生的时间都花在了刀刃上”。
def_en: Granin's Strange Life documents entomologist Lyubishchev's 56 years of logging every activity to the minute, with monthly and annual audits — time accounting as a life practice. A canonical text of Chinese productivity culture.
etymology: audit 源自拉丁 audire（听）——审计本义“听账”:古罗马查账靠朗读;柳比歇夫是自己人生的终身听账人。

synonyms.sentence: A time audit shows where the week actually went, as opposed to where it was invited.
The quantified self movement is Lyubishchev with sensors.

example: Toggl 与番茄钟的用户是柳比歇夫的不自知的教徒——他手工做了半个世纪 App 的事。
nuance: 与《四千周》正面对决:记录时间是掌控还是逃避有限性?两书互为解毒剂——本库特设 contrast 链接以固化这场辩论。

en: Wang Huning: the scholar's diary before power
def_zh: 1994-95年复旦教授王沪宁的日记:读书清单、美国观察(另著《美国反对美国》)、新权威主义思考——此后入中枢辅佐三代领导核心。研究中国政治思想的英文文献必引其人;“文胆”一词的当代标本。
def_en: The 1994-95 diary of a Fudan professor — reading lists, reflections on neo-authoritarianism, America observed (his America Against America) — written just before he entered the leadership's inner circle for three successive cores. Anglophone China-watching cites him compulsively.
etymology: éminence grise(灰衣主教)——法语借入英语指幕后智囊,源自黎塞留的密友约瑟夫神父;英文报道称王常用此词,中文对应“文胆/国师”。

synonyms.sentence: An éminence grise drafts the speech and skips the applause.
Neo-authoritarianism argued that development needs a strong hand before an open one.

example: 2021年美国书评界重新发掘《美国反对美国》——一个中国学者九十年代的美国诊断成了美国人自我审视的镜子。
nuance: 英文报道中 Wang Huning 几乎是“ideas matter in Chinese politics”的人格化论据——读其日记即读中国政治的知识分子暗线;与教材“党的领导”单元构成理论与人事的互注。
